params.name: Embossed Spring Couplets
params.description: Crafted by the R&D team for the Lunar New Year, this specially designed pair of spring couplets showcases intricate patterns using a gold-foiling technique. The words on it are penned by a renowned calligrapher, not only making it valuable but also highly visually appealing.
